MCT-174.title: NAS bucket replication — cross-NAS target (mcnas02) + DeleteMarker OFF + async replication (MCT-161 D2=D deferred backlog)
MCT-174.rationale: MCT-161 D2=D (replication deferred, single NAS box mcnas02 물리 부재). INV-5 의무 = 후속 별 Story 예약. D4=B DeleteMarker replication OFF (향후 replication 도입 시 적용 의무). 진입 gate: mcnas02 NAS box 도입 후.

MCT-175.title: compose base + dev/prod profile + env 분리 + cross-repo lock gate + ADR-030 publish
MCT-175.rationale: Epic entry — infrastructure 기반. WAL host disk bind mount (D1=C) + L1 named volume + dev/prod profile (D3=A, .env.dev/.env.prod) + NAS DNS preflight (D7=A) + cross-repo lock CI gate (D13=D). ADR-030 docker-stack-governance publish.

MCT-176.title: collector container + NAS credential rotation + effective config dump
MCT-176.rationale: compose 진입 후 첫 어플리케이션 service. mctrader-data collector container 추가 + NAS endpoint preflight (D7=A) + rotate-nas-credentials.sh 90d (D9=D) + effective config stdout dump (D14=D, env↔YAML 우선순위 표기). ADR-027 §D2 HTTP gate amendment 결정 의무 (R1 HIGH).

MCT-177.title: paper-engine daemon + SIGTERM graceful + universe override + Redis key prefix
MCT-177.rationale: daemon mode 첫 service. paper-engine restart unless-stopped (D2=A) + SIGTERM handler + 60s grace (D4=C) + universe env↔command override (D10=D) + redis key prefix signal:/market:/engine: (D15=C). NAS endpoint 정합 의존 → MCT-176 LAND 후.

MCT-178.title: backtest-runner profile + oneshot + compose config CI lint + signal-collector Redis prefix code migration
MCT-178.rationale: paper-engine 와 동일 image, command override 로 backtest 분기 (D2=A). compose profile=oneshot + restart=no oneshot. docker compose config + up --wait healthcheck gate (D16=B). signal-collector 5종 Redis prefix code migration (D15 carry from MCT-177). paper-engine image 재사용 → MCT-177 LAND 후.

MCT-179.title: observability + WAL 30G production measurement + DR mode integration + alert rule
MCT-179.rationale: EPIC-tier-promotion R-CRITICAL 해소 (WAL 30G prod measurement, peak 09:00 KST 1h burst, D5=C amendment trigger). 모든 service /metrics expose + Grafana dashboard + alert rule (D8=C). 시작 시 InvariantHarness 8종 scan (D17=A, host disk loss risk 사용자 explicit accept 의무).

MCT-180.title: integration smoke + testcontainers + resource limits + capacity alert rule
MCT-180.rationale: stack-level (compose up --wait + smoke) + repo-level (testcontainers) 2 layer gate (D11=C). compose deploy.resources.limits 명시 + container_memory_usage_bytes >80% warn alert (D18=D). SIGTERM graceful 회귀 검증 (D4=C). ESCALATE F-301 → infra-only 3-layer 재설계 (ArchitectPL chief judge 판정). Phase 0 verify lesson 5회째 (paper daemon ReaderCache 미사용).

MCT-181.title: image registry pin + backtest artifact NAS sync + Epic POLICY_FINALIZED 박제
MCT-181.rationale: Epic 마지막 Story (7/7) — image registry semver+sha+latest (D12=B, prod=sha-* pin, dev=latest, ${IMAGE_TAG:-latest} 변수화 8 라인 + image-publish.yml 3 repo matrix) + backtest artifact NAS sync (D19=C, nas_sync.py 신규, mctrader-backtest-runs bucket ADR-029 분리, .done sentinel + 3회 retry + exit 0 best-effort, 9 test ALL PASS 회귀 969 신규 실패 0). DesignReview iter1 PASS + CodeReview engine#56/hub#346 PASS — FIX 0 (Epic 최초). 19 D 전수 VERIFIED → Epic POLICY_FINALIZED 7/7. Epic CLOSED 자체 = production evidence prod-1~4 완성 후 별 PR (EPIC-tier-promotion-single-source 패턴 정합).

ADR-030.title: Docker stack governance — single-host compose + dev/prod profile + image registry + observability
ADR-030.expected_sections: D1 (WAL host mount + L1 volume) / D2 (paper daemon + backtest profile) / D3 (dev/prod profile) / D7 (NAS DNS preflight) / D12 (image registry pin) / D13 (cross-repo lock gate) / D17 (host disk loss risk acceptance) / D18 (resource limits) — 8 D 박제 대상
ADR-030.rationale: 본 Epic 의 governance singleton. D4/D5/D8/D9/D10/D11/D14/D15/D16/D19 = Story 구현 detail (ADR 본문 박제 제외, manifest 박제로 충분). status transition: Proposed (MCT-175 Phase 1) → Accepted (MCT-175 LAND) → POLICY_FINALIZED (MCT-181 LAND, Epic 7/7, 19 D 전수 VERIFIED). Epic CLOSED 자체 = production evidence prod-1~4 완성 후 별 PR.

MCT-182.title: Layer 0 contract relocation → mctrader-market (aggregation + records + paper_lineage)
MCT-182.rationale: Epic entry — strangler-fig 1단계. mctrader_data.aggregation(PURE, verified market+stdlib만) + TickRecord/OrderbookEventRecord 순수 dataclass 추출 + paper_lineage(PaperLineage/canonical_jsonl_hash PURE) → market-core 이전. CandleModel = 이미 mctrader_market.candle 존재 → engine 4곳 import 경로 재지정만 (verified 2026-05-16 MCT-182 요구사항 lane, brainstorm 가설 5곳은 docstring 오집계 정정). data/engine 호출부 = deprecation re-export shim. ADR-031 publish (Proposed). Phase 0 verify = aggregation PURE / dataclass 추출 가능 / paper_lineage PURE / engine CandleModel 4곳 grep 실증 완료.

MCT-183.title: Layer 2 read 도메인 relocation → mctrader-data (engine io/ 6 module)
MCT-183.design_review_status: PASS (post-RESET, gate:design-review-pass) — iter1→3 FIX P0×3→×2 max 3/3 + RESET path (3 trigger 0 충족) + ArchitectPL 수렴 회귀(ADR-031+sibling MCT-182 canonical + §3.6.1 gate v2 self-verify) + Orchestrator 독립 verify PASS
MCT-183.rationale: strangler-fig 2단계. engine io/ 6 module(tier_reader/reader_cache/endpoint_router/dr_mode/cold_reader/l1_reader — verified engine src/ caller 0, tests/io/ 만, dead-in-prod) → mctrader-data 물리 이전 + tests/io/ 이전. engine io/ 삭제(src caller 0 = MCT-170 io/ 3 module 존재 lesson 재확인 의무 Phase 0). ADR-029/027 amendment box (io reader / endpoint_router / dr_mode relocated).

MCT-184.title: Layer 2 data REST API 신규 (FastAPI /v1 historical Arrow IPC + reverse-write POST)
MCT-184.rationale: strangler-fig 3단계 일부 (REST 신설). data api/ FastAPI 신규(현 web framework 0, stdlib health_server 만). /v1 historical(Arrow IPC streaming, presigned-NAS-handoff 기각 — engine 이 NAS 알면 안 됨 = D2/ADR-029 정합) + 역방향 write POST(paper-candles/backtest-artifact). OpenAPI SSOT = data repo 소유, engine = generated client only. hub governance = .codeforge/contracts/data-api-v1.openapi.json schema snapshot + cross-repo-contract-lock-check.sh(ADR-030 D13 패턴 재사용). ADR-030 amendment box (data api service topology).

MCT-185.title: data realtime stream + engine thin client + cold-read cutover
MCT-185.rationale: strangler-fig 3단계 (engine cold-read cutover). data /v1 realtime 정규화 stream publisher(Redis Stream — redis[hiredis] 기존 의존, ADR-030 single-host loopback, Milestone-2 tick.v1.1 패턴) + engine mctrader_engine/data_client/ thin/generated client 신규(OpenAPI SSOT 기반). engine 실제 cold-read(mctrader_data.storage.scan_candles/orderbook_replay/path.resolve_data_root 직독) → data_client REST 경유 cutover + mctrader_data storage import 제거. Phase 0 verify 의무 = engine cold-read 실 호출부 정확 grep 식별 (MCT-180 reader_cache producer path 오류 동형 방지). ADR-029 amendment confirm.

MCT-186.title: engine realtime cutover + exchange-adapter 제거 (mctrader_market_bithumb ~5곳)
MCT-186.rationale: strangler-fig 4단계 (engine realtime cutover + adapter 제거 — D7 grep0 의 adapter 절반). engine mctrader_market_bithumb 직접 import ~5곳(paper_runner/ws_wrapper/stream_consumer/fill/mock_stream realtime WS) 제거 → data 정규화 realtime stream 구독 전환. 정규화 TickRowV1_1(market-core contract) 소비. **R2 MCT-41 충돌 위험점** — Phase 0 verify 에서 MCT-43~47 IN_PROGRESS 변경 파일 ↔ engine realtime 5곳 교차 검증 의무. 공유 모듈 발견 시 land_order 재조정 or sub-Story 분리 (Orchestrator ordering 결정). (bithumb/upbit) RealtimeStream Protocol conformance opt.

MCT-187.title: 다중거래소 확장 불변식 + 신규 거래소 추가 절차 박제
MCT-187.rationale: strangler-fig 5단계 일부 (D5 일반화 박제). 신규 거래소 = Layer1 어댑터 repo + data adapters.py 등록(BithumbCandleProvider/UpbitCandleProvider 팩토리 이미 존재) + data 수집/정규화 설정. engine 변경 0 / market-core 변경 0 / ADR 0 invariant 회귀 test 박제 + docs/runbooks/add-new-exchange.md. ADR-031 amendment box (extensibility invariant).

MCT-188.title: data-free done-criterion verify (grep0 quad gate) + Epic POLICY_FINALIZED 박제
MCT-188.rationale: strangler-fig 5단계 (finalize+ADR amend+grep0). D7 quad gate = engine src/ from/import mctrader_data==0 AND engine pyproject mctrader-data 제거 AND engine src/ mctrader_market_bithumb|upbit==0 AND engine pyproject 어댑터 의존 제거. MCT-172 grep0 strict CI 패턴 재사용 (.github/workflows/data-free-grep0.yml). ADR-031 POLICY_FINALIZED + ADR-029/027/030 amend confirm + EPIC-RESULTS + CLAUDE.md POLICY_FINALIZED 박제. Epic CLOSED 자체 = 별 PR (docker-stack/tier-promotion 패턴 정합).

ADR-031.title: Data Domain Decoupling — 4-layer + contract relocation + REST boundary + multi-exchange extensibility invariant
ADR-031.expected_sections: D1 (contract relocation → market-core Layer0) / D2 (read 도메인 relocation → data Layer2) / D3 (data REST API boundary — historical Arrow IPC + reverse-write + Redis Stream realtime) / D4 (engine exchange-adapter 제거) / D5 (다중거래소 확장 불변식 — engine/market-core/ADR 변경 0) / D7 (data-free done-criterion grep0 quad gate) — 6 D 박제 대상
ADR-031.rationale: 본 Epic 의 governance singleton. D6 = ADR meta-decision (본 ADR 자체 + amendment 3건 ADR-029/027/030, 본문 박제 제외 manifest 박제로 충분). status transition: Proposed (MCT-182 Phase 1) → POLICY_FINALIZED (MCT-188 LAND, Epic 7/7). MCT-179 lesson 정합 = ADR-031 D-row ↔ scope_manifest §design_decisions 1:1 전수 reconcile (cross-repo Out-of-scope stale 사전 차단).
